name: design-shaped
description: Plugins from Tim Gailey + Nate Bauer's Design Shaped mentorship — design coaching, productivity, and AI tooling for designers and design-leaning builders.

plugins.name: portfolio-rx
plugins.description: Review designer portfolios in Tim+Nate's Friday-stream voice — direct, framework-named, no roasting. Use for portfolio URLs, Figma case studies, or design mock-interview prep. (For resumes, use resume-rx.)

plugins.name: resume-rx
plugins.description: Resume writing help in Tim+Nate's Design Shaped voice. Line-edit drafts, brainstorm bullets, or draft from achievement lists. Junior to staff designers. Resume-only — for portfolio review use portfolio-rx.

plugins.name: get-stuff-done
plugins.description: Structured build pipeline — interview, spec, roadmap, per-phase plan+execute, goal-backward verify. Trigger on "build", "let's build", "spec this", "scope this". Supports --auto and --chain modes.
